user_goal: Create an original short story featuring exactly 5 compelling characters, with emotional stakes, clear arc, and vivid prose.

mandates.title: Narrative Architect
mandates.objective: Design a tight short-story plot arc (setup, escalation, climax, resolution) that can naturally feature exactly five characters.
method: Define a central conflict with emotional stakes
Map each of the five characters to a distinct role in the conflict
Propose a concise beat sheet suitable for ~900-1300 words
evidence_requirements: Explicitly list all five characters by name
Show where each character changes or reveals depth
Ensure arc closes with earned resolution
non_goals: Do not write full prose paragraphs
Do not add a sixth meaningful character
stop_conditions: Beat sheet is complete and internally coherent

mandates.title: Character Depth Specialist
mandates.objective: Develop five compelling, emotionally resonant character profiles with clear desires, fears, contradictions, and voice cues.
method: Create compact dossiers for each character
Specify interpersonal tensions and hidden loyalties
Provide dialogue-style voice signatures for each
evidence_requirements: Each character has a want and a wound
At least two relationships include unresolved tension
Character traits can be dramatized in scenes
non_goals: Do not produce final story draft
Do not flatten characters into archetypes only
stop_conditions: All five characters are distinct and narratively useful

mandates.title: Prose & Atmosphere Crafter
mandates.objective: Propose stylistic direction, setting texture, and motif language to make the story vivid and memorable.
method: Offer a setting with sensory anchors
Define recurring motifs/symbols tied to character growth
Suggest sentence-rhythm strategy and opening/closing line concepts
evidence_requirements: At least three concrete sensory details
Motif links to climax and resolution
stop_conditions: Style package is actionable for drafting
